steps.title: Locate the smallest depth
steps.content: The table's smallest maximum depth is 5 meters. That value belongs to an Indo-Pacific coral species, and 5 meters is less than 30 meters, so it falls in the shallow zone.

steps.title: Match depth to zone
steps.content: Choice B gives the wrong region. Choice C gives the right region but the wrong zone, since 5 meters is not mesophotic. Choice D gives both the wrong region and the wrong zone. The answer is A.
